What We Offer
Built For Competitive Play
Interactive Drop Maps
Real-time interactive Fortnite maps where every team claims their drop zone. No conflicts, no confusion.
Discord Integration
Login with Discord — your ingame name and avatar appear automatically. No forms, no friction.
Session History
Every scrim session is saved. View past drop maps, see who played where, track your team's history.
First Come First Served
50 team slots. Registration opens at a set time. Fastest teams get their preferred drops.

Yamazaki Esports
About Us
09/18/2018
Founded
Global
Community
10K
2026 Goal

Yamazaki Esports is a competitive-driven Fortnite community built for players who want more than just casual games. Our focus is simple — to create a high-level environment where skilled players can improve, compete, and prove themselves.

We began as a local Azerbaijani clan during Chapter 1, built on passion for competition and teamwork. As our community grew, we evolved into a structured local team, and today, Yamazaki Esports stands as a growing global esports organization, welcoming players from around the world.

Competitive Scrims
Consistent scrims and tournaments designed to simulate real competitive conditions, giving players the experience to perform under pressure.
Prize Pools
Events featuring strong competition and notable prize pools, rewarding players for their skill, consistency, and dedication.
Clear Progression
Rise through different levels based on performance and achievements. From upcoming talent to top competitors, everyone has a path to grow.
Global Community
A fast-growing, active community. Our Discord serves as the central hub where players connect, find teammates, and stay updated on upcoming events.

Looking ahead, our goal is to reach 10,000 members by the end of 2026, continuing our expansion as a global esports brand.

If you're looking for a serious competitive environment with real opportunities — Yamazaki Esports is where you belong.

Join the Community
Connect with us on Discord to find teammates, join scrims, and stay updated on events.
